description: Letter from Mūsā b. Yaʿqūb al-Miṣrī, in Minyatayn (the "two Minyas," Ghamr and Zifta, located across from each other on one of the Delta tributaries), to Abū l-ʿAlā' Yūsuf b. Dā'ūd b. Shaʿyā, in Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. 1056 CE. The letter discusses the flax harvest and confirms the receipt of some clothes. There is a passing mention of someone's illness in the margin (line 3). (Information from Gil.)
tags: illness: mention, illness: marad, illness letter 969-1517, flax, Illness, Arabic address
description_he: מכתב ממוסא ב' יעקוב אל-מצרי ממינייתיין (שתי הדלתא, ע'מר וזפתה) לאבו אל-עלאא יוסף ב' דאוד ב' שעיא בפוסטאט. מתוארך כ-1056. דן בקציר הפשתן ומאשר קבלת בגדים.
